title: Amoria raddeana
intro: There is not enough information available about the plant Amoria raddeana.
taxonomy: Amoria raddeana belongs to the phylum Mollusca and the class Gastropoda. This classification places it within the group of snails. Further, it is classified under the order Pulmonata, which contains air-breathing snails and slugs. Within this order, it is classified under the family Pomatiidae, a family of small to medium-sized snails. Amoria raddeana is specifically a species of freshwater snail found in Southeast Asia.
